response.justification: Strong software craftsman with ~14 years of polyglot full-stack experience, TDD discipline, and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators). However, the role calls for a director-level IC Principal Engineer with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud strategy leadership — the resume shows mostly senior/staff IC roles in product engineering with only nascent AI work, no advanced AI degree, no evidence of advising strategic customers, and limited cloud-platform depth (AWS CDK mentioned once). Title and scope gap is significant.
strengths: ~14 years polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Strong craftsmanship culture: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, public workshops and OSS
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks)
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale
Lacks director-level IC scope: no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product future-state
Thin cloud-platform depth (single AWS CDK reference, no GCP/Azure/multi-cloud architecture leadership)
